description: Convert a room in the default sample house project into a home gym using NCH DreamPlan Home Design Software. The gym must include at least one cardio machine (such as a treadmill, elliptical, or exercise bike) and at least one strength training item (such as a weight bench, dumbbells, or multi-gym). Change the flooring of the selected room to a gym-appropriate material, such as rubber, carpet, or cork, ensuring it is distinct from the original floor. All equipment must be placed on the floor inside the room. Export a screenshot of the final design to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\gym_design.png.
